L1_headline: + SEM – Daniel Thomas acquired 14,035 restricted shares. | 07/29/25
L2_brief: Director Daniel Thomas received a grant of 14,035 restricted stock shares at $0 cost on July 29, 2025. The shares vest in full on July 29, 2026. This is a standard director compensation grant rather than an open-market purchase, bringing his total direct holdings to 80,035 shares.

L3_detailed.pattern_notes: This is a restricted stock grant as part of director compensation, not a discretionary open-market purchase. The grant represents approximately 17.5% of the director's total post-transaction holdings, indicating a meaningful equity stake tied to company performance. Shares vest on one-year anniversary (July 29, 2026).
risks_flagged: Restricted stock grant with 1-year cliff vesting - not an open market transaction indicating insider sentiment
